title: Tinketh Fo
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:FreePlanetsrep3.jpg]] |name=Tinketh Fo |homeworld=[[Keyorin]][[Star Wars (1977) 85|''Star Wars'' (1977) 85]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Pinurquian]]{{InsiderCite|89|Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Solo... you wouldn't be tryin' to lean on me any, would you? What you're describing sounds a lot like protection to me."
"We don't like guys who try an' lean on the Boss...|Tinketh Fo and one of his bodyguards to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|}} '''Tinketh Fo''', sometimes called "'''Boss'''," was an astute [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pinurquian]] who served as the planetary leader of [[Keyorin]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In the aftermath of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] climactic defeat at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]—emissaries from the newly formed [[Alliance of Free Planets]]—visited Keyorin and asked Fo to attend the upcoming [[First Conference of Free Peoples]], and represent Keyorin's interests. Although Fo was initially skeptical, he was impressed by Solo's panache and promised to consider the idea. the Pinurquian ultimately attended the conference in Endor, listening to speeches from Alliance leader [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]].[[Star Wars (1977) 90|''Star Wars'' (1977) 90]] ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Tinketh Fo}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 85|''Star Wars'' (1977) 85]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 85}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 90|''Star Wars'' (1977) 90]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 90}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|89|Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy}} {{1stID|Tinketh Fo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Fo, Tinketh}} [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Pinurquians]] [[Category:Planetary leaders]]
